name: book_calendar
description: Book a calendar appointment for a service. This tool creates a lead and schedules an appointment.

name.description: The full name of the person booking the appointment.

email.description: The email address of the person booking. Optional, but recommended.

phone.description: The phone number of the person booking.

date.description: The date for the appointment in YYYY-MM-DD format.

time.description: The time for the appointment in HH:MM format.

service.description: The name or type of service they want to book.
